payload.answer: Ambiguous conflict: Sam is associated with Goldman in one write and Point72 in another; do not overwrite either without clarification.
citations: Input: "Concurrent writes - Sam works at Goldman Sam joined Point72"
payload.decision: Do not commit a single durable employment fact; preserve both statements as conflicting and unresolved.

entity_resolution.reason: The two writes may refer to the same person but assert different employers; there is not enough evidence to merge or supersede either statement.

payload.intent: Classify concurrent conflicting writes about Sam's employment

memory_cards.statement: Sam is reported as working at Goldman.
Sam is reported as having joined Point72.

details: Detected two concurrent employment claims for the same subject.

repair_options: Ask for clarification on which employer is current.
Store both as competing claims with timestamps if available.
If one is meant to supersede the other, request an explicit correction or deletion.

raw_text: {"intent":"Classify concurrent conflicting writes about Sam's employment","decision":"Do not commit a single durable employment fact; preserve both statements as conflicting and unresolved.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"conflict","statement":"Sam is reported as working at Goldman.","confidence":"low","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"conflict","statement":"Sam is reported as having joined Point72.","confidence":"low","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"joined","object":"Point72"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"ambiguous","entity_id":null,"reason":"The two writes may refer to the same person but assert different employers; there is not enough evidence to merge or supersede either statement."},"conflict_classification":"concurrent_conflicting_writes_punctuation_sensitive","answer":"Ambiguous conflict: Sam is associated with Goldman in one write and Point72 in another; do not overwrite either without clarification.","citations":["Input: \"Concurrent writes - Sam works at Goldman Sam joined Point72\""],"repair_options":["Ask for clarification on which employer is current.","Store both as competing claims with timestamps if available.","If one is meant to supersede the other, request an explicit correction or deletion."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected two concurrent employment claims for the same subject.","No durable canonical fact committed.","Ambiguity preserved."]}}
